title: PressTV: IRGC targets US airbase in retaliation for Bandar Abbas strikes
snippet: Iran's state broadcaster PressTV provides Iranian government perspective on IRGC retaliatory strike against US airbase, framing CENTCOM strikes as aggression and IRGC response as legitimate defense.
tag_reason: Iranian state media perspective on IRGC-CENTCOM exchange; updates yesterday's Hormuz warning shots story with direct IRGC airbase strike

entities.name: IRGC Retaliatory Strike on US Airbase (May 28, 4:50 AM)
